text: Stepping through this modern space, I feel a mix of curiosity and anticipation. The glass doors, vibrant colors, and reflective surfaces invite me in—a threshold between the familiar and the experimental. Inside, the "R+D" wall leaps out: Responsive and rapidly evolving. The words evoke the thrill of discovering new ways humans connect and coexist with intelligent machines. There’s a quiet, focused energy here; I feel part of something forward-looking and imaginative, yet I’m also aware of the subtle coolness of the environment. I am eager to see what thoughtful insights or provocations await beyond these walls.
